simple_types.name: Process_Status
simple_types.code:
type Process_Status is
  (Success,
   Protocol_Error,
   Negotiation_Failed,
   Key_Exchange_Failed,
   Host_Key_Not_Verifiable,
   MAC_Error,
   Authentication_Failure, Disconnected, Need_More_Data);

enumeration_literals.name: Protocol_Error
enumeration_literals.description: Generic protocol violation (bad state, unexpected msg, parse failure)

enumeration_literals.name: Negotiation_Failed
enumeration_literals.description: Algorithm negotiation found no common algorithms

enumeration_literals.name: Key_Exchange_Failed
enumeration_literals.description: KEX crypto failure (DH, signature, ops not set, flow mismatch)

enumeration_literals.name: Host_Key_Not_Verifiable
enumeration_literals.description: Host key rejected by verifier or signature verification failed

enumeration_literals.name: MAC_Error
enumeration_literals.description: MAC/AEAD tag mismatch or decryption failure

array_types.name: Byte_Array
array_types.code: type Byte_Array is array (Positive range <>) of Byte;

access_types.name: Host_Key_Verifier
IO_Read_Exactly
access_types.code: type IO_Read_Exactly is access procedure (Buf : out Byte_Array; OK : out Boolean);

access_types.name: IO_Send
access_types.code: type IO_Send is access procedure (Data : Byte_Array);

access_types.name: Random_Generator
access_types.code: type Random_Generator is access function (Length : Positive) return Byte_Array;

access_types.name: User_Verifier
access_types.code:
type User_Verifier is
  access function (Username : String; Method : String; Data : Byte_Array) return Boolean;
